Docs.summary: Options for retrieving the list of top level domain legal agreements.

Docs.summary: If true, then the list of agreements will include agreements for domain transfer as well; otherwise, false.

Docs.summary: If true, then the list of agreements will include agreements for domain privacy as well; otherwise, false.
